traducoes.portugues: síndrome do desconforto respiratório agudo, (syn.) SDRA
traducoes.frances: syndrome de détresse respiratoire aiguë, (syn.) SDRA
traducoes.espanhol: síndrome de dificultad respiratoria aguda, (syn.) SDRA
traducoes.chines: 急性呼吸窘迫综合征 , (syn.) ARDS
traducoes.japones: 急性呼吸窮迫症候群 , (syn.) 急性呼吸促迫症候群 , ARDS

entradas.definicao_en: (syn.) ARDS Respiratory disease characterized by the rapid onset of widespread inflammation in the lungs.

traducoes.arabe: ةعانم ةبستكم ، (syn.) ةعانم ةَّيفُيكت ، ةعانم ةفيكتم
traducoes.chines: 获得性免疫 , (syn.) 适应性免疫
traducoes.japones: 獲得免疫 , (syn.) 適応免疫

entradas.definicao_en: (syn.) acquired immunity Immunity acquired during a person’s lifetime upon exposure to an infectious agent either by previous infection or immunization.

traducoes.japones: エアロゾル , (syn.) エアゾール

entradas.definicao_en: Suspension of solid or liquid particles in a gas.

traducoes.arabe: دقف ةساح قوذلا ، (syn.) نادقف ةساح قوذلا ، دقف ةساح قوذتلا

entradas.definicao_en: Disorder characterized by loss of taste.

traducoes.arabe: لاقتنا نع قيرط ءاوهلا ، (syn.) لاقتنا نع قيرط ذاذر ، لاقتنا ربع ءاوهلا
traducoes.japones: 空気感染 , (syn.) 飛沫核感染

entradas.definicao_en: (syn.) aerosol transmission Mode of indirect transmission of an infectious disease that occurs when an infectious agent is carried by dust or droplet nuclei suspended in the air in the form of aerosols.

traducoes.frances: enzyme de conversion de l'angiotensine, (syn.) ECA
traducoes.espanhol: enzima convertidora de la angiotensina, (syn.) ECA
traducoes.russo: ангиотензин-превращающий фермент, (syn.) АПФ (syn.) ангиотензин-конвертирующий фермент, (syn.) АКФ
traducoes.chines: 血管紧张素转换酶 , (syn.) ACE
traducoes.japones: アンジオテンシン変換酵素 , (syn.) ACE

entradas.definicao_en: (syn.) ACE Class of ectoenzymes found in, e.g., the lungs, heart, skin, or blood vessels, whose function is to cleave circulating peptides, among which angiotensinogen, which are then used to regulate specific cell functions.
Disorder characterized by loss of smell.

traducoes.japones: 抗体 , (syn.) 免疫グロブリン

entradas.definicao_en: (syn.) immunoglobulin Protein produced by B lymphocytes that can recognize and neutralize an antigen.

traducoes.arabe: سم دضت ، ( syn . ) لوم د م داض

entradas.definicao_en: Particle, typically a protein, which the immune system recognizes as foreign.
Mode of transmission of an infectious disease to another person from an infected person who does not develop symptoms.
Proportion of people that contract a disease in a population initially free of the disease, i.e. during a disease outbreak.

traducoes.frances: taux de reproduction de base, (syn.) 𝑅₀
traducoes.espanhol: número básico de reproducción, (syn.) 𝑅₀ , tasa de contagio, tasa de reproducción

entradas.definicao_en: (syn.) basic reproduction ratio, basic reproductive ratio, 𝑅₀ Average number of secondary cases that one case produces in a population at risk.
Application of statistical methods and tools to the fields of biological sciences and medicine, including study design, data collection and analysis, and interpretation of findings.

(syn.) plasma Liquid part of the blood in which red and white blood cells and platelets are suspended and which carries such blood cells as well as proteins, mineral salts, sugars, fats, and hormones throughout the body.
Person who is diagnosed as having a disease.
Set of criteria used to decide whether a person has contracted a specific disease.

traducoes.portugues: taxa de letalidade, (syn.) taxa de letalidade dos casos
traducoes.arabe: لدعم ةتامإ ةلاحلا ، (syn.) لدعم تايفو ةلاحلا

entradas.definicao_en: (syn.) CFR Proportion of people who die of a given disease out of all the confirmed cases.
Person who has been in the proximity of a person affected by an infectious disease but does not live with or care for the infected person.

traducoes.japones: 感染の連鎖 , (syn.) 感染成立の連鎖

entradas.definicao_en: Process in which an infectious agent leaves its reservoir or host through a portal of exit, is conveyed by a mode of transmission, and enters a susceptible host through a portal of entry.

Quinoline that is substituted at position 4 by a [5- (diethylamino)pentan-2-yl]amino group and at position 7 by chlorine and is used for the treatment of e.g. malaria, lupus erythematosus, and rheumatoid arthritis.
Person who lives with, cares for, or has direct contact with the respiratory secretions or body fluids of, a person affected by an infectious disease.
(syn.) disease cluster Aggregation of cases of a disease within a given place and time.

traducoes.frances: tomographie assistée par ordinateur, (syn.) tomodensitométrie, TDM
traducoes.chines: 计算机断层扫描 , (syn.) 计算机断层成像 , 电子计算机断 层成像
traducoes.japones: コンピュータ断層撮影

entradas.definicao_en: (syn.) computer-assisted tomography, computerized tomography, CT Medical imaging technique by which three-dimensional images of the body are obtained by directing a beam of x-rays at the patient and quickly rotating them around the patient’s body, producing cross-sectional images that are then stacked together by a computed tomography scanner.

traducoes.arabe: ةلاح ةدكؤم ، (syn.) ةلاح ةدكؤم ةباصلإا ضرملاب

entradas.definicao_en: Case that is confirmed by a laboratory test.
Person who has been in the proximity of another person affected by an infectious disease and who is at risk of having contracted this disease.

traducoes.portugues: seguimento de contatos, (syn.) acompanhamento de contatos
traducoes.japones: 接触者のフォローアップ

entradas.definicao_en: Process of monitoring the contacts of a case for symptoms of the disease.

traducoes.portugues: identificação de contatos, (syn.) identificação de contactos (pt-PT)

entradas.definicao_en: Process aimed at identifying all contacts of a case by asking about the activities of the case and the activities and roles of the people around the case since the onset of the disease.

traducoes.portugues: rastreamento de contatos, (syn.) rastreamento de contactos (pt-PT)

entradas.definicao_en: Process of identification, listing and follow-up of contacts.
Strategy adopted by a public body to cut off transmission of a disease.

traducoes.portugues: terapia com plasma convalescente, (syn.) tratamento com plasma convalescente
traducoes.frances: utilisation thérapeutique de plasma de convalescents
traducoes.chines: 恢复期血浆治疗 , (syn.) 康复者血浆治疗

entradas.definicao_en: Therapeutic treatment whereby the blood plasma donated by individuals who have recovered from an infectious disease is introduced into the blood of people who are suffering from the same disease in order to help control the symptoms and limit the progression of the disease.

traducoes.arabe: سوريف يجات ، (syn.) سوريف يليلكإ ، سوريف لكم ل

entradas.definicao_en: (syn.) CoV Family of viruses that consist of a core comprising a positive-sense single-stranded RNA, an envelope, a capsid, and spikes.

traducoes.japones: 新型コロナウイルス感染症 , (syn.) COVID-19

entradas.definicao_en: (syn.) COVID-19 Infectious disease caused by SARS-CoV-2.

traducoes.espanhol: reflejo tusígeno, (syn.) reflejo de la tos
traducoes.arabe: م ن كع س سلا لاع

entradas.definicao_en: Body's natural response to help clear irritants from the airways.

traducoes.espanhol: síndrome de liberación de citocinas, (syn.) tormenta de citocinas
traducoes.chines: 细胞因子释放综合征 D
traducoes.japones: サイトカイン放出症候群 , (syn.) CRS

entradas.definicao_en: (syn.) CRS Systemic inflammatory response syndrome caused by a large and rapid release of cytokines into the blood, which may be triggered by different factors, e.g. a viral infection or the use of certain drugs in immunotherapy.

traducoes.espanhol: razón de muertes por casos nuevos
traducoes.coreano: 신규  확진자  대비  신규  사망자  비율

entradas.definicao_en: Number of deaths attributed to a particular disease in a specified period divided by the number of new cases of the disease identified during the same period.
Mode of transmission that occurs when an infectious agent is transferred from a reservoir to a host by direct contact or droplet transmission.
Abnormal condition that has a negative impact on the structure or function of all or part of an organism, generally associated with certain signs and symptoms.

traducoes.japones: 集団発生 , (syn.) アウトブレイク

entradas.definicao_en: Cluster of a disease with a common cause and an overall number of cases that is inferior to that of an epidemic.

traducoes.japones: デオキシリボ核酸 , (syn.) DNA

entradas.definicao_en: (syn.) DNA Double-stranded nucleic acid whose nucleotides consist of a backbone made up by a modified sugar, called deoxyribose, a nitrogenous base, i.e. adenine, guanine, cytosine, and thymine, and a phosphate group.

traducoes.russo: тестирование по принципу «не выходя из машины»

entradas.definicao_en: Method of performing swab tests on people whilst they remain in their vehicles.
Dried residue, approximately ≤ 5 μm in diameter, which results from the evaporation of droplets coughed or sneezed into the air.

traducoes.portugues: transmissão por gotículas respiratórias, (syn.) transmissão por gotículas
traducoes.japones: 飛沫感染 , (syn.) 飛沫散布

entradas.definicao_en: (syn.) droplet spread Mode of direct transmission of an infectious disease that occurs when a person is in the proximity of an infected person who has respiratory symptoms, e.g., via coughing, sneezing, breathing, or talking.

traducoes.arabe: ةطخ ءاضق ىلع ضرم ، (syn.) ةيجيتارتسا ةحفاكم ضرم ، ةيجيتارتسا ءاضق ىلع ضرم

entradas.definicao_en: (syn.) suppression, elimination strategy Strategy adopted by a public body to reduce to zero the incidence of a disease in a given geographical area.

entradas.categoria: MEDI, Public health & hygiene Public health & hygiene
entradas.definicao_en: Disease for which there are as many cases as would be expected in a given population at a given time.
Set of actions and processes, including cleaning, disinfecting and monitoring, implemented in places at risk of spread of an infectious agent through contaminated objects.
Graphical representation of the incidence of a disease or other health-related event plotted over time.
Disease for which there are many more cases than would be expected at a given time in a given population and which can be ascribed to the same cause.

traducoes.portugues: limite epidêmico, (syn.) limiar epidêmico, limiar epidémico (pt-PT)

entradas.definicao_en: Number of individuals within a population at risk that is required for an epidemic to occur.
Scientific study of the occurrence of a disease or other health-related event in specified populations, and its application to the control of health problems.
(syn.) pyrexia Innate immune response mechanism that increases a person’s body temperature above the normal level.

traducoes.frances: masque de protection respiratoire, (syn.) masque FFP
traducoes.japones: フィルター式フェイスピースレスピレーター

entradas.definicao_en: (syn.) filtering face-piece respirator, FFR Respiratory protective equipment that uses filters to remove hazardous substances from the air being breathed by the wearer.
Inanimate object contaminated by an infectious agent that can indirectly transmit an infectious disease.

(syn.) face shield (syn.) full-face visor (syn.) visor Personal protective equipment that protects the wearer’s eyes and face from sprays, splashes, and large-particle droplets, and prevents the spread of respiratory droplets from the wearer to others.
Sequence of DNA that carries the required information for making a specific molecule, typically a protein.

Therapeutic treatment whereby one or more foreign genes are inserted into the genome of an organism by means of a vector, to compensate for abnormal genes or to help the organism produce a protein that can be beneficial for it.
Complete set of DNA of a living organism, including all of its genes.

traducoes.russo: кожный антисептик, (syn.) антисептическое средство для рук , санитайзер

entradas.definicao_en: Gel, foam, or liquid used for handwashing that may or may not contain alcohol.
Action of removing any unwanted substance or microorganism from a person's hands using water or another liquid, with or without soap or other detergents.

traducoes.espanhol: inmunidad de grupo, (syn.) inmunidad colectiva, inmunidad de rebaño

entradas.definicao_en: (syn.) community immunity Indirect protection from an infectious agent achieved in a population at risk when a sufficiently large proportion of individuals in the population show an acquired immunity to that infectious agent.

traducoes.japones: ハイリスク群 , (syn.) 高危険群

entradas.definicao_en: Part of a population at risk that has higher than average prevalence, incidence or severity of a disease.
Garment of personal protective equipment worn in healthcare settings to reduce the risk of exposure to infectious agents.
Admission and stay of a patient in a hospital for treatment.
Person or animal infected by an infectious agent.
Set of practices that help to maintain health and prevent the spread of diseases.

traducoes.japones: 免疫反応 , (syn.) 免疫応答

entradas.definicao_en: Reaction of the immune system of an organism to potentially harmful stimuli.
resposta imune, resposta imunológica

Network of cells and antibodies that defends the body against the attack of agents perceived as extraneous and potentially harmful to it by triggering an immune response, which can be specific (adaptive) or not specific (innate).

traducoes.portugues: sistema imunitário, (syn.) sistema imunológico,    sistema imune

entradas.definicao_en: sistema inmunológico
Condition of being protected against an infectious disease.
Case who has a history of travel from an affected area some time before the onset of the disease and cannot be linked to local transmission.
New cases of a disease arising in a given period in a population at risk.
инцидентность
Lapse of time between the exposure to an infectious agent and the onset of the symptoms of a disease.

traducoes.japones: インデックスケース , (syn.) 発端者,  最初の患者

entradas.definicao_en: (syn.) index patient The first known case of the outbreak of a disease in a cluster.
Mode of transmission that occurs when an infectious agent is transferred from a reservoir to a host by means of a vehicle, i.e. water, food or air, a vector or a fomite.

traducoes.portugues: taxa de letalidade da infecção, (syn.) letalidade dos infectados
traducoes.frances: taux de mortalité par infection, (syn.) IFR
traducoes.japones: 感染死亡率 , (syn.) 感染致死率

entradas.definicao_en: (syn.) IFR Proportion of people who will die of a certain disease out of all those who have been infected.

traducoes.japones: 感染病原体 , (syn.) 感染因子

entradas.definicao_en: Biological agent that may or may not cause an infectious disease.
Disease caused by a pathogen.
Ability of an infectious agent to enter, survive, and multiply in a host.
Series of innate immunity processes initiated by the body in response to an injury.

traducoes.espanhol: unidad de cuidados intensivos, (syn.) unidad de terapia intensiva, UCI, UTI
traducoes.arabe: ةدحو ةيانع كرم ةز ، (syn.) ةدحو ةياعر كرم ةز ، ةدحو ةيانع ثكم ةف ، ةدحو ةياعر ثكم ةف
traducoes.russo: отделение реанимации и интенсивной терапии, (syn.) ОРИТ
traducoes.chines: 重症监护室 , (syn.) 加护病房

entradas.definicao_en: (syn.) critical care unit, ICU, CCU Hospital facility that provides critical care and life support for acutely ill or injured patients.
(syn.) endotracheal intubation Invasive lung ventilation method in which a tube is inserted into the patient’s trachea through the mouth or nose.

traducoes.arabe: صحف يربخم ، (syn.) صحف يربتخم ، رابتخا يربخم

entradas.definicao_en: Diagnostic test performed on samples of a person’s body, e.g. blood, urine, saliva, tissues, typically in specially equipped facilities.

traducoes.japones: 都市封鎖 , (syn.) ロックダウン

entradas.definicao_en: (syn.) confinement Strategy adopted by a public body because of an emergency that requires people to remain in a certain location which they may not leave other than for exceptional reasons.

(syn.) magnetic resonance tomography, nuclear magnetic resonance imaging, MRI, MRT, NMRI Medical imaging technique by which three-dimensional images of the body are obtained by exciting protons present in the water of living tissues and detecting the change in the direction of their rotational axis by means of a magnetic resonance imaging scanner.

traducoes.frances: imagerie par résonance magnétique, (syn.) imagerie par résonance magnétique nucléaire, IRM

entradas.definicao_en: Commercially produced or homemade covering for nose and mouth used to reduce the spread of respiratory droplets from the wearer to others.

traducoes.russo: искусственная вентиляция лёгких, (syn.) аппаратное дыхание, ИВЛ

entradas.definicao_en: Lung ventilation provided by driving fresh air into the lungs by positive pressure and/or by pumping expiratory air out of the lungs by negative pressure.

traducoes.russo: аппарат искусственной вентиляции легких, (syn.) аппарат ИВЛ

entradas.definicao_en: (syn.) ventilator Machine that helps patients to breathe by driving fresh air into the lungs by positive pressure and/or by pumping expiratory air out of the lungs by negative pressure, replacing some or all of the muscular effort required for lung ventilation.
Administration and delivery of healthcare by professionals.
Personal protective equipment for the hands typically worn by healthcare professionals to protect themselves from exposure to infectious agents or other biological, chemical or physical hazards.
Strategy adopted by a public body to reduce the number of infected people in a given geographical area and limit the impact on the health system of a disease outbreak.

traducoes.arabe: ةقيرط لاقتنا ىودع ، (syn.) ةليسو لاقتنا ىودع

entradas.definicao_en: (syn.) route of transmission Means by which an infectious agent spreads from one host to another.

traducoes.arabe: مسج داضم ديحو ةليسنلا ، (syn.) ض د ديحو ةليسنلا ، مسج داضم يداحأ أشنملا
traducoes.japones: モノクローナル抗体 , (syn.) 単クローン抗体

entradas.definicao_en: Laboratory-produced molecule that targets and attacks specific antigens, thereby triggering a specific immune response.
Level of health and well-being of an individual.
(syn.) multiorgan failure, MOF Inability of two or more organs or organ systems to perform their function.
fallo multiorgánico

Method of collecting a specimen of nasal secretions for diagnostic purposes by inserting a swab into each nostril, extending it back into the nasopharynx, leaving it in place for a few seconds, and slowly withdrawing it with a rotating motion.

traducoes.russo: неинвазивная искусственная вентиляция легких, (syn.) неинвазивная ИВЛ

entradas.definicao_en: (syn.) NIV Positive pressure ventilation provided through a person’s upper respiratory airways using an oxygen mask.

traducoes.arabe: لسلست تاديوونلا ، (syn.) لسلست تاديتويلكوينلا ، لسلست يديتويلكون

entradas.definicao_en: Sequence of the repeating units of DNA or RNA.
seqüência nucleotídica (pt-BR)

traducoes.japones: 世界的大流行 , (syn.) パンデミック

entradas.definicao_en: (syn.) pandemic disease Epidemic disease that has spread to different countries and continents.

traducoes.japones: 世界的大流行への備え

entradas.definicao_en: Ability of a public body to deal with a threat to human health caused by a pandemic by ensuring that appropriate response plans are in place.
Infectious agent causing a disease.
patógeno
(syn.) PPE Gear worn by an individual that provides protection against one or more risks to a person’s health and safety.
Study of the use and effects of drugs in large numbers of people, the aim of which is to estimate the probability of positive or negative effects of a drug.

traducoes.portugues: teste laboratorial remoto, (syn.) teste de diagnóstico rápido, TLR, TDR
traducoes.espanhol: análisis junto al paciente, (syn.) pruebas a la cabecera del paciente
traducoes.japones: ポイントオブケアテスティング , (syn.) ポイントオブケアテス , POCT

entradas.definicao_en: (syn.) point-of-collection testing, POCT Method of performing a laboratory test at or near the site of patient care.

traducoes.portugues: reação em cadeia da polimerase, (syn.) PCR
traducoes.frances: amplification en chaîne par polymérase, (syn.) réaction en chaîne par polymérase, réaction en chaîne à la polymérase, ACP, PCR
traducoes.espanhol: reacción en cadena de la polimerasa, (syn.) RCP, PCR
traducoes.arabe: لسلستم ةرملب لعافت ، (syn.) لعافت يلسلست يزاريميلوب ، لعافت زاريميلوب لسلستم
traducoes.japones: ポリメラーゼ連鎖反応

entradas.definicao_en: (syn.) PCR Molecular biology technique that applies high temperature and a DNA polymerase to a sample of DNA containing the target sequence, thereby producing copies of small segments of the original DNA for use in further molecular and genetic analysis.

traducoes.portugues: porta de entrada, (syn.) via de entrada

entradas.definicao_en: Anatomical site at which an infectious agent enters a host.

traducoes.portugues: porta de saída, (syn.) via de saída

entradas.definicao_en: Anatomical site at which an infectious agent leaves a host.

traducoes.arabe: لاقتنا نم باصم لبق روهظ ضارعأ
traducoes.chines: 症状前传播 , (syn.) 潜伏期传播

entradas.definicao_en: Mode of transmission of an infectious disease to another person from an infected person who has not yet developed symptoms.
All cases of a disease observed at a given point in time in a population at risk.
(syn.) patient zero Case to whom the onset of the outbreak of a disease can be traced back.

Case that is compatible with a clinical case definition and for whom there is strong epidemiological evidence of disease, e.g. the person is a contact of a confirmed case but no laboratory test confirmation is available.

Science of protecting and improving the health of people through the organized efforts of society by promoting a healthy lifestyle, preventing injuries, and preventing, detecting and responding to infectious diseases.

traducoes.portugues: vigilância sanitária pública, (syn.) vigilância em saúde pública
traducoes.frances: surveillance épidémiologique, (syn.) surveillance de santé publique
traducoes.japones: 公衆衛生サーベイランス

entradas.definicao_en: Ongoing systematic collection, analysis, and dissemination of health data to help guide public health decision making and action.

Strategy adopted by a public body to keep apart from the general population for a certain period of time all individuals suspected of having contact with a person affected by an infectious disease or coming from an affected area, until it is confirmed that they have not contracted the disease.

traducoes.portugues: reação em cadeia da polimerase da transcrição reversa em tempo real, (syn.) RT-PCR em tempo real, rRT-PCR
traducoes.frances: RT-PCR en temps reel, (syn.) RT-PCR temps reel
traducoes.espanhol: reacción en cadena de la polimerasa con transcripción inversa en tiempo real
traducoes.arabe: لعافت زاريميلوب لسلستم خسنلل يسكعلا يف نمزلا يقيقحلا
traducoes.russo: полимеразная цепная реакция с обратной транскрипцией в реальном времени, (syn.) ОТ-ПЦР-РВ
traducoes.chines: 实时逆转录聚合酶链反应, (syn.) rRT-PCR
traducoes.japones: リアルタイム逆転写ポリメラーゼ連鎖反応 , (syn.) Real-Time RT-PCR

entradas.definicao_en: (syn.) real-time RT-PCR, rRT-PCR Reverse transcription polymerase chain reaction in which detection and quantification of amplified DNA sequences are performed after each PCR cycle.

traducoes.japones: 病原巣 , (syn.) レゼルボア

entradas.definicao_en: Natural habitat in which an infectious agent normally lives, grows, and multiplies.
Disease affecting the airways and the lungs and hindering normal breathing, which may be caused by, e.g., infection, air pollution, or exposure to noxious substances.

(syn.) droplet Particle made of water, proteins, viral RNA, and non- volatile metabolites, which is >5- 10 μm in diameter and is exhaled from the nose and mouth of a person whilst e.g. coughing, sneezing breathing, or talking.

traducoes.chines: 呼吸道卫生 , (syn.) 咳嗽礼仪

entradas.definicao_en: (syn.) cough etiquette Set of practices and behaviours adopted by an individual with the aim of preventing the spread of respiratory diseases.

traducoes.portugues: equipamento de proteção respiratória, (syn.) EPR, respirador
traducoes.arabe: تادعم ةيامح ةيسفنت ، (syn.) زاهج سفنت قاو
traducoes.russo: респиратор, (syn.) средство индивидуальной защиты органов дыхания, СИЗОД

entradas.definicao_en: (syn.) respirator (en-US), RPE Personal protective equipment that protects the wearer against inhalation of hazardous substances in the air, such as dust, fumes, gases, or biological substances.

traducoes.japones: 危険因子 , (syn.) リスク因子

entradas.definicao_en: Characteristic, condition, or behaviour that increases the likelihood that a person will contract a disease or sustain an injury.

(syn.) RNA Single-stranded nucleic acid whose nucleotides consist of a backbone made up by a simple sugar, called ribose, a phosphate group, and a nitrogenous base, i.e. adenine, guanine, cytosine, and uracil.
(syn.) self-quarantine Measure taken by an individual in order to avoid contact with other people and thus help to prevent the spread of an infectious disease.
Organ dysfunction syndrome caused by an impairment of the physiological regulatory mechanisms via which a host responds to infection.
Class of sepsis in which abnormalities of circulation, i.e. persistent hypotension despite fluid resuscitation, and/or of cellular metabolism are serious enough to increase mortality substantially.
(syn.) serological test, antibody test Laboratory test aimed at detecting in the blood serum of an individual the presence of antibodies produced in response to a given disease.

traducoes.arabe: صحف يجولوريس ، (syn.) ليلحت لصم ، صحف لصم
traducoes.japones: 血清学的検査 , (syn.) 血清検査

traducoes.portugues: síndrome respiratória aguda grave, (syn.) síndrome respiratória aguda severa, SARS
traducoes.alemao: schweres akutes Atemnotsyndrom, ( syn. ) schweres akutes Atemwegssyndrom, SARS
traducoes.arabe: ةمزلاتم ةيسفنت ةداح ةميخو ، ( syn. ) ةمزلاتم باهتللاا يوئرلا داحلا ميخولا ، سراس
traducoes.chines: 严重急性呼吸系统综合征 , (syn.) 非典型肺炎, SARS
traducoes.japones: 重症急性呼吸器症候群 , (syn.) SARS

entradas.definicao_en: (syn.) SARS Infectious disease caused by SARS-CoV-1.

traducoes.portugues: coronavírus da síndrome respiratória aguda grave 2, (syn.) coronavírus 2 da síndrome respiratória aguda grave, SARS-CoV-2
traducoes.espanhol: coronavirus del síndrome respiratorio agudo grave 2, (syn.) coronavirus 2 del síndrome respiratorio agudo grave, SARS-CoV-2
traducoes.russo: второй коронавирус тяжелого острого респираторного синдрома, (syn.) SARS-CoV-2
traducoes.chines: 严重急性呼吸综合征冠状病毒 2, (syn.) SARS-CoV-2
traducoes.japones: 新型コロナウイルス , (syn.) SARS-CoV-2

entradas.definicao_en: (syn.) SARS-CoV-2 Coronavirus that causes COVID-19.

Strategy adopted by a public body to reduce physical contact and proximity between individuals in a community in order to reduce the risk of transmission of an infectious disease, for example by instructing or advising individuals to maintain a certain distance from each other or by prohibiting gatherings of more than a certain number of people.

traducoes.japones: スパイク糖タンパク質 , (syn.) スパイク

entradas.definicao_en: (syn.) spike Glycoprotein complex made up of three protomers and located on the envelope of coronaviruses, which enables the virus to bind to the receptor site of the host cells.

traducoes.japones: スーパースプレッダー

entradas.definicao_en: Person affected by an infectious disease who transmits the disease to a significantly higher number of people than does the average infected person.

traducoes.espanhol: mascarilla quirúrgica, (syn.) barbijo quirúrgico ( es-AR), tapaboca quirúrgico (es-CU)
traducoes.japones: 医療用マスク , (syn.) サージカルマスク

entradas.definicao_en: Half-face mask, flat and rectangular in shape, made of nonwoven fabric and comprising filtration layers, with folds and elastic bands or long straight ties that can be looped behind a person’s ears or tied around a person’s head, which is used to protect the wearer from sprays, splashes, and large-particle droplets and to prevent the spread of respiratory droplets from the wearer to others.
Case that is compatible with a clinical case definition but there is no laboratory test confirmation or strong epidemiological evidence, e.g. the person is not a contact of a confirmed case.
Piece of soft material used by a healthcare professional for cleaning wounds or taking samples from a person’s body for testing purposes.
Method of collecting a sample of organic material for diagnostic purposes by inserting a swab into a person’s body orifices, e.g. nose, mouth, etc.

traducoes.japones: 拭き取り検査 , (syn.) スワブ検査

entradas.definicao_en: Manifestation of a disease that is perceptible to only the patient (subjective symptom) or to the patient and others (objective symptom or sign).
Mode of transmission to another person of an infectious disease from an infected person who has developed symptoms.

traducoes.portugues: síndrome da resposta inflamatória sistémica, (syn.) SIRS
traducoes.frances: syndrome de réponse inflammatoire systémique, (syn.) SIRS
traducoes.espanhol: síndrome de respuesta inflamatoria sistémica, (syn.) SRIS
traducoes.chines: 全身炎症反应综合征 , (syn.) SIRS T
traducoes.japones: 全身性炎症反応症候群 , (syn.) SIRS

entradas.definicao_en: (syn.) SIRS Condition characterized by a disproportionate inflammatory response to a variety of severe clinical phenomena, including relating to body temperature (>38°C or <36°C), heart rate (>90 beats per minute), respiratory rate (>20 breaths per minute or PaCO2 <32 mmHg), and white blood cell count (>12,000/cu mm, <4,000/cu mm, or >10% immature band forms).

Remote provision of clinical and non-clinical services using information and communication technologies, such as diagnosis and treatment of diseases and injuries, research and evaluation, and education of health professionals.
Vascular disease involving the formation of thrombi inside a blood vessel, i.e. an artery or a vein, obstructing circulation.
Process of sorting patients or casualties to determine priority of need and proper place of treatment.

traducoes.portugues: pronto atendimento, (syn.) serviço de urgência básica, serviço de atendimento permanente, SAP, SUB

entradas.definicao_en: Medical care provided for illnesses or injuries that require prompt attention but are typically not so serious as to require the services of an emergency room.

traducoes.portugues: unidade de pronto atendimento, (syn.) centro de saúde, UPA
traducoes.frances: centre de soins non programmés, (syn.) service d'accueil médical non programmé
traducoes.russo: отделение неотложной медицинской помощи, (syn.) кабинет неотложной помощи
traducoes.japones: 初期救急施設 , (syn.) 急病診療所

entradas.definicao_en: (syn.) urgent care center A walk-in clinic led by qualified medical professionals, i.e. doctors and nurses, in which urgent care is delivered.

Therapeutic preparation containing an antigen, i.e. a virus or a segment of a virus or a toxin generated by bacteria, that may have been attenuated, inactivated or killed and which is able to trigger the immune response and generate immunity in an organism.

Living organism that indirectly transmits an infectious disease to a susceptible host either by carrying the infectious agent on its body (mechanical vector) or by providing an environment in which the infectious agent can reproduce and survive (biological vector).
Amount of viral particles present in a millilitre of a fluid sample, e.g. blood.
Virus that has been genetically modified for use in gene therapy.
Microscopic infectious agent that can multiply only in living cells of animals, plants, or bacteria, consisting of genetic material, either DNA or RNA, housed inside a capsid.

traducoes.arabe: ةروص ةعشأ ةينيس ، (syn.) ةروص ةعشأ سكا

entradas.definicao_en: Image formed by the shadows of the objects inside a patient’s body when x-rays travel through it and pass through an x-ray detector on the other side of the patient.

traducoes.japones: 人獣共通感染症 , (syn.) 動物由来感染症

entradas.definicao_en: Infectious disease that is transmissible under natural conditions from vertebrate animals to humans.
